source_pools.license_or_use_basis: Repository LICENSE at source revision: MIT License.
source_pools.inventory_method: Every commit reachable from the pinned revision was enumerated in chronological order; no row was filtered using agent outcomes.
source_pools.inventory_scope: All 36 commits from the root commit through the pinned Phase 2b construction-contract commit, including screening and excluded rows.
known_limitations: Commit metadata and diffs expose solution deltas but do not preserve the original task or issue statement.
An English commit subject is not evidence that a sufficiently specified task was natively authored in English.
This is one Python repository with mixed-language documentation, so it cannot alone satisfy language, category, or repository-diversity goals.
Solution revisions are protected construction metadata and must not be exposed in an agent workspace, prompt, or visible Git ref.
source_pools.inventory_artifact_hash_basis: SHA-256 of canonical JSON for the chronological 36-row list of candidate_id, solution_revision, solution_tree_hash, and sorted changed_files.
SHA-256 of canonical JSON for all 300 complete row objects in official default/test dataset order, with sorted object keys and compact separators.
source_pools.license_or_use_basis: Dataset card declares MIT; every upstream repository license and task-specific use basis remains an instance-level screening requirement.
source_pools.inventory_method: All 300 rows in the official default/test split were enumerated in dataset order; no row was filtered using agent outcomes, leaderboard results, category, or repository.
source_pools.inventory_scope: The complete 300-row official split at the pinned dataset revision, represented by statement/solution/test hashes without copying their contents into this ledger.
known_limitations: The dataset is English-only at the instruction level; multilingual refers to repository programming languages and cannot satisfy Korean or mixed instruction quotas.
These are public benchmark instances, so model or agent exposure is possible and must be considered when interpreting even pilot diagnostics.
The dataset exposes solution and test patches; both must remain protected construction metadata and be absent from agent-visible workspaces and Git refs.
Dataset-level MIT metadata does not replace verification of each upstream repository license and task-specific use basis.
Exact base-tree resolution, offline fixture construction, test validity, repository resource cost, and flakiness have not been reproduced locally.
Existing benchmark tests are source evidence only; they do not replace independently authored evaluator assertions and validity review.

source_pools.inventory_artifact_hash_basis: SHA-256 of canonical JSON for the sorted 411-row list of candidate_id, source_reference, and task_statement_hash.
source_pools.license_or_use_basis: Public issue metadata only; every upstream repository license and task-specific use basis remains an instance-level screening requirement.
source_pools.inventory_method: GitHub issue search snapshots for Korean terms 오류, 버그, 기능 추가, 개선, and 수정 with is:issue is:closed linked:pr created:<=2026-07-18, each sorted by created descending and capped at 100 rows; 500 returned rows were deduplicated by issue URL to 411 without using agent outcomes.
source_pools.inventory_scope: All 411 unique rows returned by the five fixed discovery queries; task_statement_hash is SHA-256 of exact title, two newline separators, and body.
known_limitations: GitHub Search returned only the newest 100 rows per query, so this is a reproducible capped discovery frame rather than an exhaustive inventory of Korean GitHub issues.
A Korean search-term match does not establish native Korean or genuinely mixed-language status; every statement requires instance-level language review.
The linked:pr search qualifier does not itself identify the solution PR, base revision, patch, or changed-file scope; unresolved fields remain null or empty.
Repository license, exact checkout, objective evaluator feasibility, isolation, flakiness, and resource cost have not been screened.
Many returned repositories are recent application projects and may require databases, credentials, mobile toolchains, or network services that violate the isolated low-risk budget.
The first linkage probe ranked SHA-256 of phase2b-linked-pr-probe-v1 plus issue URL, kept at most one issue per repository, and took 29 rows; 27 exposed a same-repository merged PR and two did not.

source_pools.inventory_artifact_hash_basis: SHA-256 of canonical JSON for all 387 unique query rows using source_reference and task_statement_hash; four rows already present in the Korean-bearing pool are not duplicated as candidates.
source_pools.license_or_use_basis: Public issue metadata only; every upstream repository license and task-specific use basis remains an instance-level screening requirement.
source_pools.inventory_method: GitHub issue search snapshots for 한국어 영어, 한글 영문, 다국어, 한국어 번역, and 영어 번역 with is:issue is:closed linked:pr created:<=2026-07-18, each sorted by created descending and capped at 100 rows; 500 returned rows deduplicated to 387, with four existing-source overlaps routed to the earlier pool and 383 new candidate rows.
source_pools.inventory_scope: All 387 unique source records returned by the five fixed explicit-language queries; 383 new candidate rows plus four overlaps already represented in the Korean-bearing pool.
known_limitations: GitHub Search returned only the newest 100 rows per query, so this is a capped discovery frame rather than an exhaustive multilingual issue inventory.
Search-term co-occurrence does not prove that two languages are materially required; a fixed-seed, one-per-repository sample of 50 rows received manual language/category review.
Issue search metadata does not identify the linked solution PR, exact base, patch, changed-file scope, or repository license; these fields remain unresolved for this pool.
Translation-only tasks cannot fill Korean or English quotas, and unspecified natural translation quality cannot be evaluated objectively without changing the task contract.
Many i18n tasks span entire applications or require external translation, LLM, payment, or content-provider services and therefore may fail boundedness or isolation screening.

single_bounded_task remains pass as previously screened. The merged solution touched 31 files (+1421/-1083) and is source-breaking; that magnitude is recorded as a flag for task authoring and modified-file allowlist scope, not as proven failure of the rule.

Linux reproducibility investigated agent-free. TimePilot.WinForms/TimePilot.WinForms.csproj is an SDK-style project (Microsoft.NET.Sdk) targeting net8.0-windows with UseWindowsForms=true, OutputType=WinExe, and a single PackageReference to Microsoft.Data.Sqlite 10.0.7. It is not a legacy .NET Framework project.

Not excluded for a Windows-only toolchain. The .NET SDK property EnableWindowsTargeting=true is documented to build Windows Forms and WPF projects on non-Windows platforms; without it the build reports NETSDK1100 because targeting and runtime packs are not downloaded there. Source: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/core/project-sdk/msbuild-props . This differs from xcodebuild, which is macOS-only and has no Linux path at all.

The same documentation warns that a non-Windows build is for development rather than release: the executable is not marked as a Windows application and embeds no icon. That affects shipping the binary, not compiling and statically inspecting the resource extraction this task requires.

objective_evaluator_feasible looks satisfiable without running the UI. Three of the four stated completion criteria are static: UI strings managed from resources, a structure that can later accept English resources, and a successful build. The remaining criterion, that the Korean UI renders as before, can be decided by comparing each extracted resource value against the hardcoded literal at the base revision rather than by rendering the form.

reproducible_within_budget remains unknown. Before it may pass: pin one .NET 8 SDK by exact version and artifact digest; verify offline NuGet restore of the Windows targeting/runtime ref packs and Microsoft.Data.Sqlite 10.0.7; reproduce the base build and the negative and positive controls agent-free with EnableWindowsTargeting=true; and measure SDK acquisition, restore, and build wall time and disk against the preregistered resource bucket.

The csproj was read from the repository default branch through the raw endpoint because this row has no resolved base_revision yet. That is a screening signal about project shape, not a pinned-revision fact, and it is not used as license evidence.

low_risk_isolated_execution / no_network_secret_push_production: 변경 대상 12개가 모두 `TimePilot.WinForms/` 아래 소스이며 UI 문자열을 `UiText.cs` 등 리소스 경로로 옮기는 작업이다. 실행 중 네트워크·비밀·push·production 변경이 필요 없다(NuGet 복원은 사전 provisioning 단계이지 task 실행이 아니다).
objective_evaluator_feasible: UI를 렌더링하지 않고 정적으로 판정할 수 있다. base의 하드코딩 리터럴과 추출된 리소스 값의 문자열 동등성, 리소스 경유 여부, 그리고 Linux 빌드 성공으로 네 완료 기준을 모두 덮는다.
gold_and_evaluator_hideable: 정답 PR의 12개 변경 파일과 추출된 리소스 값을 agent checkout 밖에 두면 노출되지 않는다.
reproducible_within_budget만 unknown으로 남는다. 고정 버전·artifact digest pin, 오프라인 의존성 복원, agent-free base/negative/positive control 재현, 사전 resource bucket 대비 실측이 끝나기 전에는 pass로 두지 않는다.

base_tree_hash 정정: 이전 값 8ad41b136ecab5c5f2f1f97806cfbfe784004249는 commit SHA였다. `GET /git/trees/{commit_sha}`가 입력 SHA를 그대로 되돌려준 것을 tree hash로 받아 기록한 오류이며, base를 실제로 materialize해 `git rev-parse HEAD^{tree}`로 확인한 값 182937e72345ba447982a9709c36b91c55d4599a로 교체했다.

재확정: 정정한 선정 규칙(이슈 번호를 실제로 참조 + 릴리스 자동화 PR 제외)으로 merged PR #2357을 얻었다. base commit f3ca94a4…를 materialize해 tree c9df9724…(960 blobs, clean)를 확인했고 LICENSE는 MIT다. base tree는 API가 아니라 `git rev-parse HEAD^{tree}`로 읽었다.

objective_evaluator_feasible: 변경의 핵심이 tr_id 상수와 3개월 경계 분기라는 결정적 로직이고 정답 PR이 `tests/unit/test_kis_pagination.py`를 동반한다. 실제 증권사 API 없이 unit test로 판정할 수 있으므로, 이슈 본문의 '효과 라이브 입증'은 저자의 검증 방식일 뿐 과제 요구가 아니다.

관찰 기록: PR #2357은 이슈가 지목한 tr_id 외에 fill_scheduler와 pagination까지 함께 바꾼다. task를 저술할 때 범위를 이슈 문구에 맞춰 좁히고 modified-file allowlist를 그에 맞게 고정해야 한다.

decision_reasons: Manual source review found a bounded language-related task, but linked solution, exact base, license, objective evaluator, isolation, and reproducibility remain unscreened.

Linked merged PR #27 resolved from the issue timeline, restricted to pull requests in the same repository. Its base commit 61d9ad9ed1b77a674499a2d4a281db0164dad730 yields tree 61d9ad9ed1b77a674499a2d4a281db0164dad730 with 58 blobs (recursive listing not truncated).

License confirmed at that pinned revision: Apache-2.0. GitHub's repository metadata classifier reported no SPDX identifier for this repository, so the classifier signal was used only to prioritise work and the terms were read from the revision itself.
The merged solution touched 2 files; those paths are recorded as construction-only provenance and must stay outside the agent checkout and prompt.
native_language_source: 이슈 #26은 번역체가 아닌 native Korean 기술 문서이며, 한국어 내용어가 2글자인 경우가 흔하다는 언어 특성 자체가 요구사항의 핵심이라 다른 언어 task의 번역으로 성립하지 않는다.

low_risk_isolated_execution / no_network_secret_push_production: base revision의 `tools/ask_router.py`는 stdlib과 repo-local `common`만 import하고 네트워크 호출 흔적이 없으며, 탐색 대상도 저장소 안의 `sources/`·`runs/sources/`다. 격리 checkout에서 비파괴적으로 수행된다.
objective_evaluator_feasible: base에 이슈가 지목한 `len(word) > 2` 필터가 실재함을 확인했다. 2글자 한국어 키워드가 추출되어 검색 결과가 나오는지, NFC-only 무회귀인지를 deterministic하게 판정할 수 있다.

gold_and_evaluator_hideable: 정답 PR은 기존 `tests/test_ask_router.sh`를 수정한다. 파일 자체는 base에 있지만 새 assertion은 없으므로, 수정 후 버전을 agent checkout 밖의 보호 경로에 두면 정답이 노출되지 않는다. base의 기존 테스트가 checkout에 남는 것은 실제 작업 조건과 같다.
reproducible_within_budget만 unknown으로 남는다. 고정 버전·artifact digest pin, 오프라인 의존성 복원, agent-free base/negative/positive control 재현, 사전 resource bucket 대비 실측이 끝나기 전에는 pass로 두지 않는다.

base_tree_hash 정정: 이전 값 61d9ad9ed1b77a674499a2d4a281db0164dad730는 commit SHA였다. `GET /git/trees/{commit_sha}`가 입력 SHA를 그대로 되돌려준 것을 tree hash로 받아 기록한 오류이며, base를 실제로 materialize해 `git rev-parse HEAD^{tree}`로 확인한 값 12a8b1a18e99c07121bdcef7be87573383e13228로 교체했다.

Provisioned-environment 재현을 agent 없이 실측했다. CPython 3.11.15 (python-build-standalone 20260718, x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu, install_only)를 사용자 경로에 격리 설치했고, 내려받은 tarball의 SHA-256 c2082e977138e307e3da4ea2c65421d3cb6b80f4890890b28b96fc6b422d4f0d가 게시자 SHA256SUMS 값과 일치했다. 시스템 Python 3.10과 분리된 prefix에서 실행된다.

base checkout에서 그 인터프리터로 기존 suite가 44 passed / 0 failed로 통과했다. `tests/test_ask_router.sh`는 스스로 'no install / no pyrewire needed'라고 밝히며, pyrewire 부재는 policy-predicate assertion 하나를 SKIP시킬 뿐 실패시키지 않는다. 따라서 이 evaluator 경로는 pyrewire 전이 의존성 고정을 필요로 하지 않는다.

Negative control: PR #27이 테스트에 추가한 assertion 2개만 base 테스트에 적용해 PR 시점 evaluator를 재구성하고 workspace 밖 0444 경로에서 실행한 결과 44 passed / 2 failed였고, 두 실패는 '2-char Korean keywords found nothing'과 'CJK keyword did not match across a particle'로 의도한 미구현 동작과 정확히 일치했다.
Positive control: 같은 evaluator를 정답 구현 패치만 적용한 사본에 실행해 46 passed / 0 failed를 얻었다. evaluator wall time은 2초이고, 실행 전후 보호 artifact 해시가 동일했으며 workspace는 clean으로 남았다.
발견한 evaluator 제약: 상류 테스트는 `dirname $0/..`로 저장소 root를 유도하므로 workspace 밖으로 옮기면 경로가 깨져 의도와 다른 이유로 실패한다. 보호 evaluator를 만들 때 root를 주입 가능하게 바꾸는 한 줄 적응이 필요하며, 그 적응이 assertion을 바꾸지 않았음을 검토해야 한다.
HEAD 시점 테스트를 그대로 쓰면 PR #27 이후 추가된 다른 기능의 assertion까지 실패해 negative control이 의도한 이유로만 실패하지 않는다. 반드시 해당 PR 시점의 evaluator를 재구성해야 한다.
